label: Get Instagram Comments
description: Retrieve comments on an Instagram post. Supports both media IDs and post URLs. Requires instagram_business_manage_comments permission.

inputs.description: Row variable for Upload Post API key
Row variable for Instagram media ID
Row variable for Instagram post URL (alternative to media ID)

outputs.description: Row variable to store the array of comments

formSchema.label: Media ID variable key
formSchema.hint: Instagram media ID. Use this or post URL.

formSchema.label: Post URL variable key
formSchema.hint: Instagram post URL. Use this or media ID.
